comment.body: So you add the strike of the green and yellow lines together to calculate their geometric mean, and then that will help to determine if price will be attracted to either line that you used in the calculation? I’m having a tough time understanding this. It’s a whopper.
comment.raw_body: So you add the strike of the green and yellow lines together to calculate their geometric mean, and then that will help to determine if price will be attracted to either line that you used in the calculation? I’m having a tough time understanding this. It’s a whopper.

comment.body:
you take the strikes of the yellow line and the green line, and calculates their geometric mean.
it will ROUGHLY estimate the mean of the growth scale of the speed profile and give you a hint about a potential "event horizont" line, from where the momentum could be attracted to one or the other lines...
green or yellow...
